scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf .next; WATCHPACK_POLLING=true WATCHPACK_POLLING_INTERVAL=1000 next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000'
scripts.start:clean: sh -c 'lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; npm run build && next start --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000'
